zh.lifeSummary: Juliana於大約1316年出生在英國斯塔福爾。她於1324年之前與Robert Knightley在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1395年在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Juliana于大约1316年出生在英国斯塔福爾。她于1324年之前与Robert Knightley在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1395年在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年80岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Juliana was born about 1316, in Staffordshire, England. She married Robert Knightley before 1324, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1395, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Juliana est née environ 1316, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Robert Knightley avant 1324, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1395, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Juliana wurde um 1316 in Staffordshire, England geboren. Sie hat vor 1324 in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England Robert Knightley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1395 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Juliana è nata il circa 1316 nel Staffordshire, England. Lei sposato Robert Knightley prima del 1324, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1395, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Gnosall, Staffordshire, England.

ja.Gnosall, Stafford, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサル
ja.lifeSummary: Julianaは約1316年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた。1324年以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルでRobert Knightleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1395年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで80歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana(은)는 대략 1316년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1324년 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 Robert Knightley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Juliana nasceu aproximadamente 1316, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Robert Knightley antes 1324, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1395, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Juliana родилась около 1316 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Knightley перед 1324 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1395 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Juliana nació aproximadamente 1316, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Robert Knightley antes de 1324, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1395, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
